---
title: "Session 14: Project Work: Finalize Report & Notebook"
subtitle: "Day 5 · Project Finalization & Presentations (5-2)"
format: revealjs
metadata-files:
  - _slides.yml
---

<!-- STUB DECK — structure only; content to be filled in before the course. -->

# Session 14: Project Work: Finalize Report & Notebook

## 📋 Agenda

- Finalize the one-page report
- Prepare your presentation
- Submit the completed notebook

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

By the end of this session, you will be able to:

<!-- to be added -->

# Finalize the report

## Finalize the report

<!-- to be added -->

# Prepare the presentation

## Prepare the presentation

<!-- to be added -->

# Submit the notebook

## Submit the notebook

<!-- to be added -->

# Any questions?
